summary: Update mode testing complete. All new GM Screen features verified working: 1) Quick Dice panel visible on right side of GM Screen, 2) Quick Dice panel persists when switching between tabs, 3) All quick roll buttons work (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20), 4) Common rolls work (Attack, Advantage, Disadvantage, Damage, Fireball), 5) d100 percentile roll works, 6) Gold colors (#F59E0B) properly applied in Random Tables and Dice tab.

quick_dice_panel_visible.title: Quick Dice panel visible on right side of GM Screen
quick_dice_panel_visible.details: Persistent panel shows d4-d20 quick roll buttons, common rolls (Attack, Advantage, Disadvantage, Damage, Fireball), and d100 percentile

quick_dice_panel_persistent.title: Quick Dice panel stays visible when switching tabs
quick_dice_panel_persistent.details: Tested tab switching from Combat -> Tables -> Dice -> Notes - panel remains visible
quick_dice_panel_persistent.evidence: Test 'Quick Dice panel persists when switching tabs' passed

quick_roll_buttons_work.title: Quick roll buttons (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20) work
quick_roll_buttons_work.details: All dice buttons trigger toast notifications with roll results
quick_roll_buttons_work.evidence: Test 'Quick roll buttons (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20) work' passed

common_rolls_work.title: Common rolls (Attack, Advantage, Disadvantage) work
common_rolls_work.details: Attack shows d20 result, Advantage picks highest of 2d20, Disadvantage picks lowest
common_rolls_work.evidence: Test 'Common rolls (Attack, Advantage, Disadvantage) work' passed

gold_colors_applied.title: Gold colors (#F59E0B) replace green in GM components
gold_colors_applied.details: DiceRoller.js and RandomTables.js use #F59E0B for accents. Tables tab Shop Name button shows gold border.
gold_colors_applied.evidence: Visual inspection + grep confirmed #F59E0B usage, no #22c55e found

tab_consolidation_still_works.title: 9 tabs remain (Combat, Location, NPCs, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes)
tab_consolidation_still_works.details: Previous tab consolidation features still work correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: GM Screen improvements complete. Quick Dice panel is persistent on right side with d4-d20, common rolls, and d100. Gold colors (#F59E0B) replace green across GM components. All 9 tabs working correctly. Test credentials: lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?!
